(** **********************************************************

Contents:

- Definition of relative monads [RelMonad]
- Functoriality for relative monads [r_lift]
- Kleisli category associated to a relative monad [Kleisli_precat] [Kleisli_cat], canonical relative adjunction [rKleisli_functors_are_relative_adjoints]
- Category of relative monads is univalent if the target category is [is_univalent_RelMonad]

Reference: % \cite{DBLP:journals/corr/AltenkirchCU14} \par %

Written by: Benedikt Ahrens (started May 2017)
Extended by: Ralph Matthes (starting August 2018), in particular all on univalence


************************************************************)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * Definition of relative monads *)
Section RMonad_def.

Context {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}.

(* implicitness of arguments for RelMonad_data are set after this section *)
Definition RelMonad_data : UU
  := ∑ F : C -> D, (∏ c, D ⟦J c, F c⟧)
                 × (∏ c d, D ⟦J c, F d⟧ → D ⟦F c, F d⟧).

Definition RelMonad_ob (R : RelMonad_data) (c : C) : D := pr1 R c.
Coercion RelMonad_ob : RelMonad_data >-> Funclass.
Definition r_eta (R : RelMonad_data) c : D ⟦J c, R c⟧ := pr1 (pr2 R) c.
Definition r_bind (R : RelMonad_data) {c d} (f : D⟦J c, R d⟧) : D ⟦R c, R d⟧
  := pr2 (pr2 R) _ _ f.

Definition RelMonad_axioms (R : RelMonad_data) : UU
  := (∏ c, r_bind R (r_eta R c) = identity _ )
   × (∏ c d (f : D⟦J c, R d⟧), r_eta R _ · r_bind R f = f)
   × (∏ c d e (f : D ⟦J c, R d⟧) (g : D ⟦J d, R e⟧),
      r_bind R f · r_bind R g = r_bind R (f · r_bind R g)).


C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop (RelMonad_axioms R)


C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop (RelMonad_axioms R)

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop
  (∏ c : C, r_bind R (r_eta R c) = identity (R c))
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop
  ((∏ (c d : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧),
    r_eta R c · r_bind R f = f)
   × (∏ (c d e : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧)
      (g : D ⟦ J d, R e ⟧),
      r_bind R f · r_bind R g =
      r_bind R (f · r_bind R g)))

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop
  (∏ c : C, r_bind R (r_eta R c) = identity (R c))
 
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
t: C
isaprop (r_bind R (r_eta R t) = identity (R t))
 apply hs.
  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop
  ((∏ (c d : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧),
    r_eta R c · r_bind R f = f)
   × (∏ (c d e : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧)
      (g : D ⟦ J d, R e ⟧),
      r_bind R f · r_bind R g =
      r_bind R (f · r_bind R g)))
 apply isapropdirprod; repeat (apply impred_isaprop; intros); apply hs.
Defined.

Definition r_bind_r_eta {R : RelMonad_data} (X : RelMonad_axioms R)
  : ∏ c, r_bind R (r_eta R c) = identity _ := pr1 X.
Definition r_eta_r_bind {R : RelMonad_data} (X : RelMonad_axioms R)
  : ∏ c d (f : D⟦J c, R d⟧), r_eta R _ · r_bind R f = f := pr1 (pr2 X).
Definition r_bind_r_bind {R : RelMonad_data} (X : RelMonad_axioms R)
  : ∏ c d e (f : D ⟦J c, R d⟧) (g : D ⟦J d, R e⟧),
         r_bind R f · r_bind R g = r_bind R (f · r_bind R g)
  := pr2 (pr2 X).

(* implicitness of arguments for RelMonad are set after this section *)
Definition RelMonad : UU := ∑ R : RelMonad_data, RelMonad_axioms R.
Coercion RelMonad_data_from_RelMonad (R : RelMonad) : RelMonad_data := pr1 R.
Coercion RelMonad_axioms_from_RelMonad (R : RelMonad) : RelMonad_axioms R := pr2 R.


C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
pr1 R = pr1 R' → R = R'


C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
pr1 R = pr1 R' → R = R'

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
R = R'

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
transportf RelMonad_axioms p (pr2 R) = pr2 R'

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
isaprop (RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R'))

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
has_homsets D

  exact hs.
Defined.

(**  previous proof *)

C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
pr1 R = pr1 R' → R = R'


C, D: precategory_data

hs: has_homsets D
pr1 R = pr1 R' → R = R'

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D

hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
R = R'

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
isPredicate (λ R : RelMonad_data, RelMonad_axioms R)
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
pr1 R = pr1 R'

  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
isPredicate (λ R : RelMonad_data, RelMonad_axioms R)
 
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
R'': RelMonad_data
isaprop (RelMonad_axioms R'')

    
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
R'': RelMonad_data
has_homsets D

    exact hs.
  
C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad
hs: has_homsets D
p: pr1 R = pr1 R'
pr1 R = pr1 R'
 assumption.
Defined.


(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.map] *)
Definition r_lift (R : RelMonad_data) {c d : C} (f : c --> d) : R c --> R d
  := r_bind R (#J f · r_eta R _ ).

End RMonad_def.

(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.map_id] and
               [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.map_map] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
is_functor (R,, @r_lift C D J R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
is_functor (R,, @r_lift C D J R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
c: C
r_bind R (# J (identity c) · r_eta R c) =
identity (R c)

D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r_bind R (# J (f · g) · r_eta R c) =
r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R b)
· r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R c)

c: C

    apply (r_bind_r_eta R).

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

 apply (r_eta_r_bind R).
    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# J f · # J g · r_eta R c =
# J f · (# J g · r_eta R c)

    apply pathsinv0, assoc.
Defined.

Definition R_functor {C: precategory_data} {D: precategory} {J : functor C D}
  (R : RelMonad): functor C D
  := _,, is_functor_r_lift(J:=J) R.


(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.is_nat_trans_η] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
is_nat_trans J (R_functor R) (r_eta R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
is_nat_trans J (R_functor R) (r_eta R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# J f · r_eta R x' = r_eta R x · # (R_functor R) f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# J f · r_eta R c' = r_eta R c · # (R_functor R) f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# J f · r_eta R c' = r_eta R c · r_lift R f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# J f · r_eta R c' =
r_eta R c · r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c')

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
r_eta R c · r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c') =
# J f · r_eta R c'

  apply (r_eta_r_bind R).
Defined.

Definition r_eta_nat_trans {C: precategory_data} {D: precategory} {J : functor C D}(R : RelMonad)
  : nat_trans J (R_functor R) := _ ,, is_nat_trans_r_eta R.


(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.map_bind] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
r_bind R g · r_lift R f = r_bind R (g · r_lift R f)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
r_bind R g · r_lift R f = r_bind R (g · r_lift R f)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
r_bind R g · r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c) =
r_bind R (g · r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c))

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
r_bind R g · r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c) =
r_bind R g · r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c)

  apply idpath.
Defined.

(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.bind_map] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_lift R g · r_bind R f = r_bind R (# J g · f)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_lift R g · r_bind R f = r_bind R (# J g · f)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R b) · r_bind R f =
r_bind R (# J g · f)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R b · r_bind R f) =
r_bind R (# J g · f)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# J g · r_eta R b · r_bind R f = # J g · f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# J g · (r_eta R b · r_bind R f) = # J g · f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_eta R b · r_bind R f = f

  apply (r_eta_r_bind R).
Defined.


(* Underlying functor argument should be explicit for RelMonad_data and RelMonad *)
Arguments RelMonad_data {C} {D} J.
Arguments RelMonad {C} {D} J.


(** analogue of [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.functor_eq_eq_from_functor_ob_eq] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
p = q


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
p = q

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
base_paths R R' p,, fiber_paths p =
base_paths R R' q,, fiber_paths q

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
base_paths R R' p = base_paths R R' q
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
H': base_paths R R' p = base_paths R R' q
base_paths R R' p,, fiber_paths p =
base_paths R R' q,, fiber_paths q

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
base_paths R R' p = base_paths R R' q
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p),,
fiber_paths (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q),,
fiber_paths (base_paths R R' q)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
isaset
  ((∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
   × (∏ c d : C,
      D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
      → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧))

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
isaset (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
isaset
  (∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
   → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
isaset (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
c: C
isaset (D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
 apply hs.
    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
isaset
  (∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
   → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isaset (D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)

      apply hs.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p, q: R = R'
H: base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' q)
H': base_paths R R' p = base_paths R R' q
base_paths R R' p,, fiber_paths p =
base_paths R R' q,, fiber_paths q

  apply (two_arg_paths_f H'), uip, isasetaprop, isaprop_RelMonad_axioms, hs.
Defined.


(** Kleisli precategory associated to a relative monad *)
Section Kleisli_precat.

Context {C: precategory_data} {D : precategory} {J : functor_data C D}.

Definition Kleisli_precat_ob_mor (R : RelMonad_data J) : precategory_ob_mor :=
  make_precategory_ob_mor (ob C) (λ c d, J c --> R d).

Definition Kleisli_precat_data (R : RelMonad_data J) : precategory_data :=
  make_precategory_data (Kleisli_precat_ob_mor R) (λ c, r_eta R c)
                                              (λ a b c f g, f · r_bind R g).


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
is_precategory (Kleisli_precat_data R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
is_precategory (Kleisli_precat_data R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
is_precategory_one_assoc (Kleisli_precat_data R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (a b : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧),
identity a · r_bind R f = f
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (a b : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧),
f · r_bind R (identity b) = f
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧)
(g : D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧) (h : D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧),
f · r_bind R (g · r_bind R h) =
f · r_bind R g · r_bind R h

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (a b : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧),
identity a · r_bind R f = f
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
identity a · r_bind R f = f

    apply (r_eta_r_bind R).
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (a b : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧),
f · r_bind R (identity b) = f
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
f · r_bind R (identity b) = f

    now rewrite (r_bind_r_eta R), id_right.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧)
(g : D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧) (h : D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧),
f · r_bind R (g · r_bind R h) =
f · r_bind R g · r_bind R h
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
g: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
h: D ⟦ J c, R d ⟧
f · r_bind R (g · r_bind R h) =
f · r_bind R g · r_bind R h

    now rewrite <- assoc, (r_bind_r_bind R).
Qed.

Definition Kleisli_precat (R : RelMonad J) : precategory := (_,, Kleisli_precat_is_precat R).

End Kleisli_precat.

(** Kleisli category associated to a relative monad *)
Section Kleisli_cat.


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
hs: has_homsets D
has_homsets (Kleisli_precat_data R)


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
hs: has_homsets D
has_homsets (Kleisli_precat_data R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
hs: has_homsets D
a, b: Kleisli_precat_data R
isaset (Kleisli_precat_data R ⟦ a, b ⟧)

  apply hs.
Defined.

Definition Kleisli_cat {C : precategory_data} {D : category} {J : functor_data C D} (R : RelMonad J)
  : category := (Kleisli_precat R,, Kleisli_precat_has_homsets R (homset_property D)).

End Kleisli_cat.

Section MorphismsOfRelativeMonads.

Definition RelMonadMor_data {C D : precategory_data}
           {J : functor_data C D} (R R' : RelMonad_data J): UU :=
  ∏ a : C, R a --> R' a.

Definition RelMonadMor_axioms {C D : precategory_data}
           {J : functor_data C D} {R R' : RelMonad_data J} (α : RelMonadMor_data R R') : UU
  := (∏ a : C, r_eta R a · α a = r_eta R' a) ×
     (∏ (a b : C) (f : D⟦J a,R b⟧), α a · r_bind R' (f · α b) = (r_bind R f)· α b).


C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor_data R R'
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop (RelMonadMor_axioms α)


C, D: precategory_data
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor_data R R'
hs: has_homsets D
isaprop (RelMonadMor_axioms α)

  apply isapropdirprod; repeat (apply impred_isaprop; intros); apply hs.
Defined.

(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.Kleisli_Mor_η] *)
Definition r_eta_α {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}
           {R R' : RelMonad_data J} {α : RelMonadMor_data R R'}
           (X : RelMonadMor_axioms α)
  : ∏ a : C, r_eta R a · α a = r_eta R' a := pr1 X.

(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.Kleisli_Mor_bind] *)
Definition α_r_bind {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}
           {R R' : RelMonad_data J} {α : RelMonadMor_data R R'}
           (X : RelMonadMor_axioms α)
  : ∏ (a b : C) (f : D⟦J a,R b⟧), α a · r_bind R' (f · α b) = (r_bind R f) · α b  := pr2 X.

Definition RelMonadMor {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}
           (R R' : RelMonad_data J) : UU
  := ∑ α : RelMonadMor_data R R', RelMonadMor_axioms α.
Coercion RelMonadMor_data_from_RelMonadMor  {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}
           {R R' : RelMonad_data J} (α : RelMonadMor R R') : RelMonadMor_data R R' := pr1 α.

 Coercion RelMonadMor_axioms_from_RelMonadMor {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}
         {R R' : RelMonad_data J} (α : RelMonadMor R R') :
  RelMonadMor_axioms α := pr2 α.

Definition RelMonadMor_map {C D : precategory_data} {J : functor_data C D}
           {R R' : RelMonad_data J} (f : RelMonadMor R R') (X : C)
  : R X --> R' X
  := (f : RelMonadMor_data _ _ ) X.


C, D: precategory_data
hs: has_homsets D
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α, β: RelMonadMor R R'
α = β ≃ (α : RelMonadMor_data R R') = β


C, D: precategory_data
hs: has_homsets D
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α, β: RelMonadMor R R'
α = β ≃ (α : RelMonadMor_data R R') = β

  
C, D: precategory_data
hs: has_homsets D
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α, β: RelMonadMor R R'
isPredicate
  (λ α : RelMonadMor_data R R', RelMonadMor_axioms α)

  
C, D: precategory_data
hs: has_homsets D
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α, β: RelMonadMor R R'
a: RelMonadMor_data R R'
isaprop (RelMonadMor_axioms a)

  
C, D: precategory_data
hs: has_homsets D
J: functor_data C D
R, R': RelMonad_data J
α, β: RelMonadMor R R'
a: RelMonadMor_data R R'
has_homsets D

  exact hs.
Defined.

(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.is_nat_trans_kleisli_mor] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
is_nat_trans (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
  (α : RelMonadMor_data R R')


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
is_nat_trans (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
  (α : RelMonadMor_data R R')

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (R_functor R) f · α x' = α x · # (R_functor R') f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
# (R_functor R) f · α c' = α c · # (R_functor R') f

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
r_lift R f · α c' = α c · r_lift R' f
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R c') · α c' =
α c · r_bind R' (# J f · r_eta R' c')

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
α c · r_bind R' (# J f · r_eta R c' · α c') =
α c · r_bind R' (# J f · r_eta R' c')

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
α c · r_bind R' (# J f · (r_eta R c' · α c')) =
α c · r_bind R' (# J f · r_eta R' c')

  now rewrite (r_eta_α α).
Defined.

Definition nat_trans_RelMonadMor {C : precategory_data} {D: precategory} {J : functor C D}
           {R R' : RelMonad J} (α : RelMonadMor R R'):
  nat_trans (R_functor R) (R_functor R') := _ ,, is_nat_trans_RelMonadMor α.

End MorphismsOfRelativeMonads.

Section PrecategoryOfRelativeMonads.

(* ----- Identity Morphism ----- *)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
RelMonadMor_axioms (λ a : C, identity (R a))


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
RelMonadMor_axioms (λ a : C, identity (R a))

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
c: C
r_eta R c · identity (R c) = r_eta R c
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
c: C
∏ (b : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R b ⟧),
identity (R c) · r_bind R (f · identity (R b)) =
r_bind R f · identity (R b)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
c: C
r_eta R c · identity (R c) = r_eta R c
 apply id_right.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
c: C
∏ (b : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R b ⟧),
identity (R c) · r_bind R (f · identity (R b)) =
r_bind R f · identity (R b)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad_data J
c, b: C
f: D ⟦ J c, R b ⟧
identity (R c) · r_bind R (f · identity (R b)) =
r_bind R f · identity (R b)
 do 2 rewrite id_right; apply id_left.
Defined.

Definition RelMonad_identity {C : precategory_data} {D : precategory}
  {J : functor_data C D} (R : RelMonad_data J): RelMonadMor R R
  := _ ,, RelMonad_identity_laws R.

(* ----- Composition of Morphisms ----- *)

(** generalize [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KTriples.Kleisli_composition_laws] *)

C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
RelMonadMor_axioms
  (λ a : C,
   (α : RelMonadMor_data R R') a
   · (α' : RelMonadMor_data R' R'') a)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
RelMonadMor_axioms
  (λ a : C,
   (α : RelMonadMor_data R R') a
   · (α' : RelMonadMor_data R' R'') a)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a: C
r_eta R a · (α a · α' a) = r_eta R'' a
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · α' a · r_bind R'' (f · (α b · α' b)) =
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a: C
r_eta R a · (α a · α' a) = r_eta R'' a
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a: C
r_eta R a · α a · α' a = r_eta R'' a

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a: C
r_eta R' a · α' a = r_eta R'' a

    apply (r_eta_α α').
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · α' a · r_bind R'' (f · (α b · α' b)) =
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · α' a · r_bind R'' (f · (α b · α' b)) =
α a · (α' a · r_bind R'' (f · α b · α' b))
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · (α' a · r_bind R'' (f · α b · α' b)) =
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · α' a · r_bind R'' (f · (α b · α' b)) =
α a · (α' a · r_bind R'' (f · α b · α' b))
 now repeat rewrite assoc.
    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · (α' a · r_bind R'' (f · α b · α' b)) =
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · (r_bind R' (f · α b) · α' b) =
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)

      
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
α a · r_bind R' (f · α b) · α' b =
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
r_bind R f · α b · α' b = r_bind R f · (α b · α' b)

      
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': RelMonad_data J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
r_bind R f · (α b · α' b) = r_bind R f · α b · α' b
 apply assoc.
Defined.

Definition RelMonad_composition {C : precategory_data} {D : precategory}
      {J : functor_data C D} {R R' R'' : RelMonad_data J}
      (α : RelMonadMor R R') (α' : RelMonadMor R' R''):
  RelMonadMor R R'' := _ ,, RelMonad_composition_laws α α'.

(* ----- Precategory of relative Monads (for a given functor [J]) ----- *)

Definition precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor  {C : precategory_data} {D : precategory}
      (J : functor_data C D) : precategory_ob_mor :=
  make_precategory_ob_mor (RelMonad J) RelMonadMor.


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
precategory_data


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
precategory_data

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
∏ c : precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J,
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ c, c ⟧
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
∏ a b c : precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J,
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ a, c ⟧

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
∏ c : precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J,
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ c, c ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ R, R ⟧

    apply RelMonad_identity.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
∏ a b c : precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J,
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ a, c ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R, R', R'': precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
α: precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
α': precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ R', R'' ⟧
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ R, R'' ⟧

    apply (RelMonad_composition α α').
Defined.

 apply assoc'.

Definition precategory_RelMonad {C : precategory_data} {D : precategory}
      (hs : has_homsets D) (J : functor_data C D): precategory :=
  _ ,, precategory_RelMonad_axioms hs J.

(* ----- Category of relative Monads (for a given functor [J]) ----- *)

Definition category_RelMonad {C : precategory_data} (D : category)
      (J : functor_data C D) : category :=
  precategory_RelMonad (homset_property D) J,, has_homsets_RelMonad (homset_property D) J.



C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
category_RelMonad D J ⟶ [C, D]

category_RelMonad D J ⟶ [C, D]

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
is_functor ?F

functor_data (category_RelMonad D J) [C, D]

precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
→ functor_precategory_ob_mor C D

→ functor_precategory_ob_mor C D

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
RelMonad J → C ⟶ D

      exact (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R).
    
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
∏ a b : precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J,
precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
  ⟦ ((λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     :
     precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
     → functor_precategory_ob_mor C D) a,
  ((λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
   :
   precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
   → functor_precategory_ob_mor C D) b ⟧
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
∏ a b : RelMonad J,
RelMonadMor a b
→ (a,, @r_lift C D J a) ⟹ (b,, @r_lift C D J b)
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
(R,, @r_lift C D J R) ⟹ (R',, @r_lift C D J R')

      exact (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α).
  
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
is_functor
  (make_functor_data
     ((λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
      :
      precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
      → functor_precategory_ob_mor C D)
     ((λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
       nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
      :
      ∏ a b : precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J,
      precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J ⟦ a, b ⟧
      → functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
        ⟦ ((λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
           :
           precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
           → functor_precategory_ob_mor C D) a,
        ((λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
         :
         precategory_RelMonad_ob_mor J
         → functor_precategory_ob_mor C D) b ⟧)
   :
   functor_data (category_RelMonad D J) [C, D])
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α))
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α))

    
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α))
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
∏ a : category_RelMonad D J,
# (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)) (identity a) =
identity
  (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) a)
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
a: category_RelMonad D J
# (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)) (identity a) =
identity
  (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) a)

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
a: category_RelMonad D J

identity (R_functor a)

has_homsets D

 apply D.
      
C: precategory

identity (R_functor a) x
 intros; apply idpath.
    
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α))
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
∏ (a b c : category_RelMonad D J)
(f : category_RelMonad D J ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : category_RelMonad D J ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)) (f · g) =
# (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
     (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
      nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)) f
· # (make_functor_data (λ R : RelMonad J, R_functor R)
       (λ (R R' : RelMonad J) (α : RelMonadMor R R'),
        nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)) g
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
∏ (a b c : RelMonad J) (f : RelMonadMor a b)
(g : RelMonadMor b c),
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (f · g) =
nat_trans_RelMonadMor f · nat_trans_RelMonadMor g
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R', R'': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (α · α') =
nat_trans_RelMonadMor α · nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R', R'': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
has_homsets D
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R', R'': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (α · α') x =
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α · nat_trans_RelMonadMor α') x

      
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R', R'': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
has_homsets D
 apply D.
      
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R', R'': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (α · α') x =
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α · nat_trans_RelMonadMor α') x
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R', R'': RelMonad J
α: RelMonadMor R R'
α': RelMonadMor R' R''
c: C
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (α · α') c =
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α · nat_trans_RelMonadMor α') c
 apply idpath.
Defined.

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
x: RelMonadMor_data R R'
isaset (RelMonadMor_axioms x)
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
x: RelMonadMor_data R R'
isaprop (RelMonadMor_axioms x)
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
x: RelMonadMor_data R R'
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
isaset
  ((R,, @r_lift C D J R) ⟹ (R',, @r_lift C D J R'))
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
has_homsets D
 apply D.
  
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
∏ x x' : RelMonadMor R R',
nat_trans_RelMonadMor x = nat_trans_RelMonadMor x'
→ x = x'
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
α = α'

    
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
has_homsets D
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
α = α'

    
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
has_homsets D
 apply D.
    
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
α = α'
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
homotsec α α'
 
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
c: C
α c = α' c

      
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
c: C
nat_trans_RelMonadMor α c = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α' c

      
C: precategory
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
α, α': RelMonadMor R R'
p: nat_trans_RelMonadMor α = nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
c: C
nat_trans_RelMonadMor α' c =
nat_trans_RelMonadMor α' c

      apply idpath.
Defined.


End PrecategoryOfRelativeMonads.

Section RelativeMonads_saturated.

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
≃ [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R, R_functor R' ⟧


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
≃ [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R, R_functor R' ⟧

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
isweq nat_trans_RelMonadMor

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R' → RelMonadMor R R'
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
∏ x : RelMonadMor R R',
?g (nat_trans_RelMonadMor x) = x
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
∏ y : R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R',
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (?g y) = y

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R' → RelMonadMor R R'
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R'
RelMonadMor R R'

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R'
RelMonadMor_axioms (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans α)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R'
a: C
r_eta R a · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans α a =
r_eta R' a
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R'
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans α a
· r_bind R' (f · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans α b) =
r_bind R f · nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans α b

    (* nothing like that! *)
Abort.


Definition relmonadmor_eq_type  {C : precategory_data} (D : category)
      (J : functor C D)(R R': RelMonad J) : UU
  := ∑ p : z_iso (C := [C, D]) (R_functor R) (R_functor R'),
           RelMonadMor_axioms (nat_trans_data_from_nat_trans (morphism_from_z_iso _ _ p)).


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R = R' ≃ relmonadmor_eq_type D J R R'


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R = R' ≃ relmonadmor_eq_type D J R R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R = R' ≃ ?Y
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
?Y ≃ relmonadmor_eq_type D J R R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R = R' ≃ ?Y
 apply total2_paths_equiv.
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R ╝ R' ≃ relmonadmor_eq_type D J R R'
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
H1:= make_weq
  (λ p : R_functor R = R_functor R', idtoiso p)
  (is_univalent_functor_category C D H
     (R_functor R) (R_functor R')): R_functor R = R_functor R'
≃ z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
R ╝ R' ≃ relmonadmor_eq_type D J R R'

Abort.


(** better upstream *)
Definition functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' (C : precategory_data) (C' : category)
 (F G : ob [C, C']) (α: z_iso F G) :
     ∏ a : ob C,
       z_iso (pr1 F a) (pr1 G a) :=
  λ a, tpair _ _ (is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C C' _ F G (pr1 α) (pr2 α) a).


C: precategory_data
D: category
F, G: [C, D]
p: F = G
a: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F G (idtoiso p)
  a =
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (pr1 (pr1 G))
     (base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p)) a)


C: precategory_data
D: category
F, G: [C, D]
p: F = G
a: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F G (idtoiso p)
  a =
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (pr1 (pr1 G))
     (base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p)) a)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
F: [C, D]
a: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F F
  (idtoiso (idpath F)) a =
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 F)
        (base_paths F F (idpath F))) a)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
F: [C, D]
a: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F F
  (idtoiso (idpath F)) a =
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 F)
        (base_paths F F (idpath F))) a)
 apply idpath.
Qed.
(** end of better upstream *)


(** a rather trivial observation *)

C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α))


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat (nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α))
  (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α')

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor α' = identity (R_functor R)
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α) =
identity (R_functor R')

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor α' = identity (R_functor R)
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α) =
identity (R_functor R)
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α) =
identity ((R,, @r_lift C D J R),, is_functor_r_lift R)

    (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
 · nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)) x =
identity ((R,, @r_lift C D J R),, is_functor_r_lift R)
  x

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
aux:= maponpaths pr1 H': pr1 (α · inv_from_z_iso α) = pr1 (identity R)
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
 · nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)) x =
identity ((R,, @r_lift C D J R),, is_functor_r_lift R)
  x
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
aux: homotsec (pr1 (α · inv_from_z_iso α)) (pr1 (identity R))
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)
 · nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)) x =
identity ((R,, @r_lift C D J R),, is_functor_r_lift R)
  x

    exact aux.
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor α'
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α) =
identity (R_functor R')
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α) =
identity (R_functor R')
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)
· nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α) =
identity
  ((R',, @r_lift C D J R'),, is_functor_r_lift R')

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)
 · nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)) x =
identity
  ((R',, @r_lift C D J R'),, is_functor_r_lift R') x

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
aux:= maponpaths pr1 H'': pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α · α) = pr1 (identity R')
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)
 · nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)) x =
identity
  ((R',, @r_lift C D J R'),, is_functor_r_lift R') x
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H':= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso α: α · inv_from_z_iso α = identity R
H'':= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv α: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
α':= inv_from_z_iso α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧
aux: homotsec (pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α · α)) (pr1 (identity R'))
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor (inv_from_z_iso α)
 · nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 α)) x =
identity
  ((R',, @r_lift C D J R'),, is_functor_r_lift R') x

    exact aux.
Defined.

(** its immediate consequence *)
Definition z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso  {C : precategory_data} (D : category)
      (J : functor C D) {R R': RelMonad J} (α : z_iso(C := category_RelMonad D J) R R')
  : z_iso(C := [C, D]) (R_functor R) (R_functor R') :=
  (_,, is_z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α).



C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr1 α) c =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr1 α) c =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c

  apply idpath.
Defined.



C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J (idtoiso p) =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J (idtoiso p) =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso p)),,
is_z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J (idtoiso p) =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso p)),,
is_z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J (idtoiso p) =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso p)),,
is_z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J (idtoiso p) =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso p)) =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso p)) x =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p) x

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
c: C
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso p)) c =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
c: C
nat_trans_RelMonadMor (pr1 (idtoiso (idpath R))) c =
idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor (idpath R)) c

  apply idpath.
Qed.



C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J

r_eta R' a
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
       (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) a) =

inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R')
     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) a)
· r_bind R
    (f
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
            (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
            (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) b)) =
r_bind R' f
· inv_from_z_iso

       (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
       (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) b)

r_bind R
  (f

       (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
          (R_functor R) (R_functor R')

  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c
· r_bind R' f

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J

alternative_inv_to_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α =
inv_from_z_iso α

D: category
J: C ⟶ D

α: z_iso R R'
precomp_with α
  (alternative_inv_to_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) =

C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D

C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
(α
 · ((λ c : C,
     inv_from_z_iso
       (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
          (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
          (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)),,
    (λ c : C,
     ! z_iso_inv_on_left (J c) (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
         (pr1 (R_functor R') c) (r_eta R c)
         (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
            (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
            (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)
         (r_eta R' c)
         (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ R c, R' c ⟧)
            (pr1 (pr1 α) c)
            (λ p : D ⟦ R c, R' c ⟧,
             r_eta R' c = r_eta R c · p)
            (! r_eta_α (pr1 α) c)
            (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
               (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
               (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α)
               c)
            (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso_p D J α c))),,
    (λ (c d : C) (f : D ⟦ J c, R' d ⟧),
     z_iso_inv_on_left (R' c) (pr1 (R_functor R) d)
       (pr1 (R_functor R') d)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
             (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
             (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)
        · r_bind R
            (f
             · inv_from_z_iso
                 (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C
                    D (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α) d)))
       (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
          (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
          (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) d)
       (r_bind R' f)
       (internal_paths_rew
          (D ⟦ R' c, pr1 (R_functor R') d ⟧)
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α)
                c)
           · (r_bind R
                (f
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                        C D (R_functor R)
                        (R_functor R')
                        (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                           D J α) d))
              · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
                  (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
                     α) d))
          (λ p : D ⟦ R' c, pr1 (R_functor R') d ⟧,
           r_bind R' f = p)
          (! z_iso_inv_on_right (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
               (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
               (pr1 (R_functor R') d)
               (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
                  (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
                     α) c) (r_bind R' f)
               (r_bind R
                  (f
                   · inv_from_z_iso
                       (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                          C D (R_functor R)
                          (R_functor R')
                          (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             D J α) d))
                · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C
                    D (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α) d)
               (internal_paths_rew (D ⟦ R d, R' d ⟧)
                  (pr1 (pr1 α) d)
                  (λ p : D ⟦ R d, R' d ⟧,
                   r_bind R
                     (f
                      · inv_from_z_iso
                          (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                             C D (...) (...) (...) d))
                   · p =
                   functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C
                     D (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                        D J α) c · r_bind R' f)
                  (internal_paths_rew
                     (D ⟦ R c, R' c ⟧) (pr1 (pr1 α) c)
                     (λ p : D ⟦ R c, R' c ⟧,
                      r_bind R
                        (f · inv_from_z_iso (...))
                      · pr1 (pr1 α) d =
                      p · r_bind R' f)
                     (! internal_paths_rew
                          (D ⟦ R d, R' d ⟧)
                          (pr1 (pr1 α) d)
                          (λ p : D ⟦ R d, R' d ⟧,
                           pr1 (...) c
                           · r_bind R' (...) =
                           r_bind R (...)
                           · pr1 (...) d)
                          (α_r_bind (pr1 α) c d
                             (f · inv_from_z_iso (...)))
                          (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                             C D (R_functor R)
                             (R_functor R')
                             (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                D J α) d)
                          (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso_p
                             D J α d) @
                      cancel_precomposition D
                        (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
                        (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
                        (pr1 (R_functor R') d)
                        (r_bind R'
                           (f · inv_from_z_iso ...
                            · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                                C D (...) (...) (...)
                                d)) (r_bind R' f)
                        (pr1 (pr1 α) c)
                        (maponpaths (r_bind R')
                           (internal_paths_rew
                              (D ⟦ ..., ... ⟧)
                              (f · ...) (λ ..., ...)
                              (internal_paths_rew_r
                                 ... ... ... ... ...
                                 ...) (... · ...)
                              (assoc f ... ...))))
                     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                        C D (R_functor R)
                        (R_functor R')
                        (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                           D J α) c)
                     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso_p
                        D J α c))
                  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C
                     D (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                        D J α) d)
                  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso_p D
                     J α d)))
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α)
                c)
           · r_bind R
               (f
                · inv_from_z_iso
                    (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                       C D (R_functor R)
                       (R_functor R')
                       (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          D J α) d))
           · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
               (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
               (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α)
               d)
          (assoc
             (inv_from_z_iso
                (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
                   (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                   (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                      J α) c))
             (r_bind R
                (f
                 · inv_from_z_iso
                     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso'
                        C D (R_functor R)
                        (R_functor R')
                        (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                           D J α) d)))
             (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α)
                d)))))) c = identity R c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
α c
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
       (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c) =
identity (R c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
identity (R c) =
α c
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
       (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
α c =
identity (R c)
· functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
    (R_functor R')
    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
α c =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
α c = pr1 (pr1 α) c
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr1 α) c =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
α c = pr1 (pr1 α) c
 apply idpath. 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr1 α) c =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c

    apply idpath.
Qed.


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) c =
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R')
     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) c =
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R')
     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (alternative_inv_to_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c =
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R')
     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


(** the other direction, first the inverse monad morphism *)

C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
→ category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
→ category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧

R, R': RelMonad J

fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R', R ⟧

RelMonadMor_axioms (pr1 finv)

RelMonadMor_axioms (pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
∏ a : C,
r_eta R' a · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) a = r_eta R a
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T
:
z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
∏ (a b : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧),
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) a
· r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) b) =
r_bind R' f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) b

finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
∏ a : C,
r_eta R' a · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) a = r_eta R a

finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧

r_eta R' c · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) c = r_eta R c

finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧

r_eta R' c
· pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) c =

r_eta R' c
· pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) c =
?b
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T
:
z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
?b = r_eta R c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)

finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧

r_eta R' c
· pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) c =
?b
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
?t2 =
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) c

      apply (nat_trans_inv_pointwise_inv_after_p_z_iso C D D (R_functor R) (R_functor R')). 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
r_eta R' c
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
       (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T c) = r_eta R c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
r_eta R c =
r_eta R' c
· inv_from_z_iso
    (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
       (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
r_eta R' c =
r_eta R c
· functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D (R_functor R)
    (R_functor R') (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
r_eta R' c = r_eta R c · α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
c: C
r_eta R c · α c = r_eta R' c

    apply (r_eta_α (RelMonadMor_axioms_from_RelMonadMor α)).
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
∏ (a b : C) (f : D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧),
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) a
· r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) b) =
r_bind R' f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) b
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) a
· r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) b) =
r_bind R' f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso fiso) b

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) a
· r_bind R
    (f
     · pr1
         (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T))
         b) =
r_bind R' f
· pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) b

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) a
· r_bind R
    (f
     · pr1
         (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T))
         b) = ?b

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
f
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D
        (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
        (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T b) · α b) = f

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
f
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D
        (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
        (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T b) · α b) = ?b
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T
:
z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
?b = f

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
?b = f
 apply id_right. 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
f
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D
        (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
        (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T b) · α b) =
f · identity (R' b)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D
     (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
     (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T b) · α b =
identity (R' b)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
α b =
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R') (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T b
· identity (R' b)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
fiso:= nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'): z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
finv:= inv_from_z_iso fiso: [C, D] ⟦ R_functor R', R_functor R ⟧
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R' b ⟧
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R') (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α) T b
· identity (R' b) = α b

    apply id_right.
Defined.

(** verification that the proposed inverse monad morphism is suitable *)

→ is_z_isomorphism α

  (inv_relmonadmor_from_is_z_iso D J α T)

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J

T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
(λ a : C,
 α a
 · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T))
     a) = (λ a : C, identity (R a))

      
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
aux:= z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
  (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T
   :
   z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')): (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'))
· inv_from_z_iso
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')) =
identity (R_functor R)
(λ a : C,
 α a
 · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T))
     a) = (λ a : C, identity (R a))

      
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
aux: pr1
((nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'))
· inv_from_z_iso
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'))) =
pr1 (identity (R_functor R))
(λ a : C,
 α a
 · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T))
     a) = (λ a : C, identity (R a))

      exact aux.

J: C ⟶ D

T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)

 · α a) = (λ a : C, identity (R' a))

      
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
aux:= z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
  (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T
   :
   z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')): inv_from_z_iso
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'))
· (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')) =
identity (R_functor R')
(λ a : C,
 pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) a
 · α a) = (λ a : C, identity (R' a))

      
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
aux: pr1
(inv_from_z_iso
(nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'))
· (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T : z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R'))) =
pr1 (identity (R_functor R'))
(λ a : C,
 pr1 (inv_from_z_iso (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α,, T)) a
 · α a) = (λ a : C, identity (R' a))

      exact aux.
Defined.

(** its immediate consequence *)

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J

is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
→ z_iso R R'

R, R': RelMonad J

→ z_iso R R'

z_iso R R'

D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: precategory_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧
T: is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_RelMonadMor α)
is_z_isomorphism α

  exact (is_relmonadmor_z_iso_from_is_z_iso D J α T).
Defined.



C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
z_iso R R'
≃ (∑ α : R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R',
   is_z_isomorphism α)


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
z_iso R R'
≃ (∑ α : R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R',
   is_z_isomorphism α)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
(∑ f : category_RelMonad D J ⟦ R, R' ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
≃ (∑ α : R_functor R ⟹ R_functor R',
   is_z_isomorphism α)

Abort.


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
z_iso R R' → pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')

D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
z_iso R R' → pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')

D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
