D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)) = pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R'))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
R_functor R = R_functor R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H1:= make_weq
  (λ p : R_functor R = R_functor R', idtoiso p)
  (is_univalent_functor_category C D H
     (R_functor R) (R_functor R')): R_functor R = R_functor R'
≃ z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
R_functor R = R_functor R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
H1:= make_weq
  (λ p : R_functor R = R_functor R', idtoiso p)
  (is_univalent_functor_category C D H
     (R_functor R) (R_functor R')): R_functor R = R_functor R'
≃ z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')

  apply (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α).
Defined.



C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 (R_functor R)) (pr1 (R_functor R'))
  (base_paths (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
     (maponpaths R_functor p)) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)


C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 (R_functor R)) (pr1 (R_functor R'))
  (base_paths (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
     (maponpaths R_functor p)) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths R_functor p)) =
maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths R_functor p)) = ?b
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
?b = maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths R_functor p)) = ?b
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths R_functor p) = ?t2

    apply (maponpathscomp (@R_functor C D J) (@functor_data_from_functor C D)).
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths
     (functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor)%functions
     p) = maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths
     (functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor)%functions
     p) = ?b
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
?b = maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths
     (functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor)%functions
     p) = ?b
 apply (maponpathscomp ((functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor)%functions) (@functor_on_objects C D)). 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths
  (functor_on_objects
   ∘ (functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor))%functions
  p = maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths
  (functor_on_objects
   ∘ (functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor))%functions
  p = ?b
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
?b = maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
?b = maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p)
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 p) = ?b

       apply (maponpathscomp  (@RelMonad_data_from_RelMonad C D J) (@RelMonad_ob C D J)).
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths
  (functor_on_objects
   ∘ (functor_data_from_functor C D ∘ R_functor))%functions
  p =
maponpaths
  (RelMonad_ob ∘ RelMonad_data_from_RelMonad)%functions
  p

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  (idtoiso p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  (idtoiso p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (pr2
              (make_weq
                 (λ p : R_functor R = R_functor R',
                  idtoiso p)
                 (is_univalent_functor_category C D H
                    (R_functor R) (R_functor R')))
              (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
                 (idtoiso p)))))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1
     (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H (R_functor R)
        (R_functor R')
        (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
           (idtoiso p)))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1
     (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H (R_functor R)
        (R_functor R')
        (idtoiso (maponpaths R_functor p)))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
maponpaths pr1
  (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths R_functor p)) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

  apply pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso_idtoiso_aux.
Qed.



C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
F0, G0: C → D
F1: ∏ a : C, D ⟦ J a, F0 a ⟧
gamma: F0 = G0
c: C
transportf (λ x : C → D, ∏ a : C, D ⟦ J a, x a ⟧)
  gamma F1 c =
transportf (λ d : D, D ⟦ J c, d ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma c) (F1 c)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
F0, G0: C → D
F1: ∏ a : C, D ⟦ J a, F0 a ⟧
gamma: F0 = G0
c: C
transportf (λ x : C → D, ∏ a : C, D ⟦ J a, x a ⟧)
  gamma F1 c =
transportf (λ d : D, D ⟦ J c, d ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma c) (F1 c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
F0: C → D
F1: ∏ a : C, D ⟦ J a, F0 a ⟧
c: C
transportf (λ x : C → D, ∏ a : C, D ⟦ J a, x a ⟧)
  (idpath F0) F1 c =
transportf (λ d : D, D ⟦ J c, d ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 F0 (idpath F0) c)
  (F1 c)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
F0, G0: C → D
F1: ∏ a b : C, D ⟦ J a, F0 b ⟧ → D ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧
gamma: F0 = G0
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, G0 d ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ a b : C, D ⟦ J a, x b ⟧ → D ⟦ x a, x b ⟧) gamma
  F1 c d f =
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma c)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma d)
  (F1 c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma d) f))


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
F0, G0: C → D
F1: ∏ a b : C, D ⟦ J a, F0 b ⟧ → D ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧
gamma: F0 = G0
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, G0 d ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ a b : C, D ⟦ J a, x b ⟧ → D ⟦ x a, x b ⟧) gamma
  F1 c d f =
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma c)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma d)
  (F1 c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 G0 gamma d) f))

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
F0: C → D
F1: ∏ a b : C, D ⟦ J a, F0 b ⟧ → D ⟦ F0 a, F0 b ⟧
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, F0 d ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ a b : C, D ⟦ J a, x b ⟧ → D ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (idpath F0) F1 c d f =
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 F0 (idpath F0) c)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 F0 (idpath F0) d)
  (F1 c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) F0 F0 (idpath F0)
           d) f))

  apply idpath.
Defined.

(** a preparation for the following lemma *)

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F, G: [C, D, D]
p: F = G
c: C
let α := idtoiso p in
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F G α
     (pr2 α) c)


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F, G: [C, D, D]
p: F = G
c: C
let α := idtoiso p in
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F G α
     (pr2 α) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
let α := idtoiso (idpath F) in
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 F))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F α
     (pr2 α) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
let α := idtoiso (idpath F) in
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 F))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F α
     (pr2 α) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 F))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H)
           (idtoiso (idpath F))))) c =
isotoid D H
  (pr1 (idtoiso (idpath F)) c,,
   is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
     (idtoiso (idpath F)) (pr2 (idtoiso (idpath F))) c)

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 F))
  (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 (idpath F))) c =
isotoid D H
  (pr1 (idtoiso (idpath F)) c,,
   is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
     (idtoiso (idpath F)) (pr2 (idtoiso (idpath F))) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 F))
  (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths pr1 (idpath F))) c =
isotoid D H
  (pr1
     (paths_rect [C, D, D] F
        (λ (b : [C, D, D]) (_ : F = b), z_iso F b)
        (identity_z_iso F) F (idpath F)) c,,
   is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
     (paths_rect [C, D, D] F
        (λ (b : [C, D, D]) (_ : F = b), z_iso F b)
        (identity_z_iso F) F (idpath F))
     (pr2
        (paths_rect [C, D, D] F
           (λ (b : [C, D, D]) (_ : F = b), z_iso F b)
           (identity_z_iso F) F (idpath F))) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
idpath (pr1 (pr1 F) c) =
isotoid D H
  (identity (pr1 F c),,
   is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
     (identity F) (identity_is_z_iso F) c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
idtoiso (idpath (pr1 (pr1 F) c)) =
idtoiso
  (isotoid D H
     (identity (pr1 F c),,
      is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
        (identity F) (identity_is_z_iso F) c))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
idtoiso (idpath (pr1 (pr1 F) c)) =
identity (pr1 F c),,
is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
  (identity F) (identity_is_z_iso F) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
identity_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) c) =
identity (pr1 F c),,
is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
  (identity F) (identity_is_z_iso F) c

  (* UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.show_id_type. *)
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F: [C, D, D]
c: C
identity_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) c) =
identity (pr1 F c),,
is_functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F F
  (identity F) (identity_is_z_iso F) c

  apply idpath.
Defined.


(** general lemma on univalence of functor category *)



C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F, G: [C, D, D]
α: z_iso F G
c: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F G α c)


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F, G: [C, D, D]
α: z_iso F G
c: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F G α c)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F, G: [C, D, D]
α: z_iso F G
c: C
aux: ∏ c : C,
let α := idtoiso (isotoid [C, D] (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α) in
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
(maponpaths pr1
(maponpaths pr1 (isotoid [C, D] (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
c = isotoid D H (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F G α (pr2 α) c)
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F G α c)


  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
F, G: [C, D, D]
α: z_iso F G
c: C
aux: ∏ c : C,
let α := α in
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
(maponpaths pr1
(maponpaths pr1 (isotoid [C, D] (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
c = isotoid D H (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso C D D F G α (pr2 α) c)
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 G))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) α)))
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D F G α c)

  apply aux.
Qed.



C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
transportf (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
transportf (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
transportf (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) c = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
transportf (λ d : D, D ⟦ J c, d ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) c) (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
transportf (λ d : D, D ⟦ J c, d ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (make_weq
                       (λ p : R_functor R =
                              R_functor R', idtoiso p)
                       (is_univalent_functor_category
                          C D H (R_functor R)
                          (R_functor R')))
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α)))))) c)
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
transportf (λ d : D, D ⟦ J c, d ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
              (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
     c) (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       c) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       c) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       c) = r_eta R' c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
r_eta R c
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       c) = r_eta R' c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
r_eta R c
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       c) = r_eta R c · pr1 (pr1 α) c
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
r_eta R c · pr1 (pr1 α) c = r_eta R' c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
r_eta R c · pr1 (pr1 α) c = r_eta R' c
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
X:= pr1 α: RelMonadMor_axioms (pr1 α)
r_eta R c · pr1 (pr1 α) c = r_eta R' c

       exact (pr1 X c).
       (* does not terminate: apply (r_eta_α X). *)
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
r_eta R c
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       c) = r_eta R c · pr1 (pr1 α) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
              (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
     c) = pr1 (pr1 α) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor))) c) =
pr1 (pr1 α) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
isor_p:= functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor))) c) =
pr1 (pr1 α) c

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
isor_p:= functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor))) c) =
pr1 isor_p

c: C
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
isor_p:= functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1

           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor))) c) =
isor_p

  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1

              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor))) c) =

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D

  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
idtoiso (isotoid D H isor_p) = isor_p
 apply idtoiso_isotoid.

J: C ⟶ D

c: C

isor_p:= functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
isor_p:= functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
  (pr1 (pr1 R'))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H (R_functor R)
           (R_functor R') isor))) c =
isotoid D H isor_p

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
isor_p:= functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
  (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c: z_iso (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
  (pr1 (R_functor R') c)
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
  (pr1 (pr1 R'))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (isotoid [C, D]
           (is_univalent_functor_category C D H) isor)))
  c = isotoid D H isor_p

  apply (isotoid_functorcat_pointwise C D H (R_functor R) (R_functor R')).
Defined.


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) c = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) c d = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) c d f = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) c)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) d)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
              H J α) d) f)) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (make_weq
                       (λ p : R_functor R =
                              R_functor R', idtoiso p)
                       (is_univalent_functor_category
                          C D H (R_functor R)
                          (R_functor R')))
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α)))))) c)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (pr1
              (pr1
                 (pr2
                    (make_weq
                       (λ p : R_functor R =
                              R_functor R', idtoiso p)
                       (is_univalent_functor_category
                          C D H (R_functor R)
                          (R_functor R')))
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α)))))) d)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (pr1
                    (pr1
                       (pr2
                          (make_weq
                             (λ p : R_functor R =
                                    R_functor R',
                              idtoiso p)
                             (is_univalent_functor_category
                                C D H (R_functor R)
                                (R_functor R')))
                          (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             D J α)))))) d) f)) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
              (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
     c)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
     (pr1 (pr1 R'))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths pr1
           (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
              (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
     d)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                    (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α)))) d) f)) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1
           (maponpaths pr1
              (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                 (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                 (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
                    α)))) c))
· pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
    (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
          (pr1 (pr1 R'))
          (maponpaths pr1
             (maponpaths pr1
                (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                   (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                   (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                      J α)))) d) f)
· idtoiso
    (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
       (pr1 (pr1 R'))
       (maponpaths pr1
          (maponpaths pr1
             (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α))))
       d) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1
           (maponpaths pr1
              (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                 (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                 (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
                    α)))) c))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                    (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                    (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                       J α)))) d) f)
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
          (pr1 (pr1 R'))
          (maponpaths pr1
             (maponpaths pr1
                (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                   (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
                   (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D
                      J α)))) d)) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1
           (maponpaths pr1
              (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                 (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
        c))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : D, D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                    (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
           d) f)
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
          (pr1 (pr1 R'))
          (maponpaths pr1
             (maponpaths pr1
                (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                   (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
          d)) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

D: category

  (idtoiso

        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1

        c))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1
           (maponpaths pr1
              (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                 (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
        c))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                    (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
           d) f)
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
          (pr1 (pr1 R'))
          (maponpaths pr1
             (maponpaths pr1
                (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                   (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
          d)) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1
           (maponpaths pr1
              (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                 (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
        c))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                    (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
           d) f)
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
          (pr1 (pr1 R'))
          (maponpaths pr1
             (maponpaths pr1
                (functor_eq_from_functor_z_iso H
                   (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor)))
          d)) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
        (pr1 (pr1 R'))
        (maponpaths pr1
           (maponpaths pr1
              (isotoid [C, D]
                 (is_univalent_functor_category C D H)
                 isor))) c))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
           (pr1 (pr1 R'))
           (maponpaths pr1
              (maponpaths pr1
                 (isotoid [C, D]
                    (is_univalent_functor_category C D
                       H) isor))) d) f)
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, pr1 D) (pr1 (pr1 R))
          (pr1 (pr1 R'))
          (maponpaths pr1
             (maponpaths pr1
                (isotoid [C, D]
                   (is_univalent_functor_category C D
                      H) isor))) d)) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid D H
        (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
           (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor c)))
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (isotoid D H
           (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d)) f)
   · idtoiso
       (isotoid D H
          (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
             (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d))) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R') isor c)
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (isotoid D H
           (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d)) f)
   · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R')) c d f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R') isor c)
· (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)) c d
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (isotoid D H
           (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d)) f)
   · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d) =
r_bind R' f

D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D

α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R') isor c)
· (r_bind R
     (transportb (λ x : pr1 D, pr1 D ⟦ J c, x ⟧)
        (isotoid D H
           (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
              (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d)) f)
   · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d) =

C: precategory_data

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R') isor c)
· (r_bind R
     (f
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
             (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d))
   · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d) =
r_bind R' f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) c
· (r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) d)
   · functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
       (R_functor R) (R_functor R') isor d) =
r_bind R' f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) c
· (r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) d)
   · pr1 (pr1 α) d) = r_bind R' f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) c
· (r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) d)
   · pr1 (pr1 α) d) = r_bind R' f

· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) c
· (r_bind R (f · pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α) d)
   · pr1 (pr1 α) d) = ?b

· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d =
r_bind R' f

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d =
r_bind R' f · identity (R' d)

 apply id_right.

H: is_univalent D

c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
r_bind R' f · (inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d) =

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J

c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d = identity (R' d)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
aux2: inv_from_z_iso α · α = identity R'
inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d = identity (R' d)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
aux2: pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α · α) = pr1 (identity R')
inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d = identity (R' d)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c, d: C
f: D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
isor:= z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α: z_iso (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
aux: inv_from_z_iso α c
· r_bind R (f · inv_from_z_iso α d) =
r_bind R' f · inv_from_z_iso α d
aux2: homotsec (pr1 (inv_from_z_iso α · α))
  (pr1 (identity R'))
inv_from_z_iso α d · pr1 (pr1 α) d = identity (R' d)

  apply aux2.
Defined.






C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
R = R'

 exact D.

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr1 R = pr1 R'

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
transportf
  (λ F : C → D,
   (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
   × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧)) Hob
  (pr2 (pr1 R)) = pr2 (pr1 R')

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr2
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
transportf (λ F : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)))
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
transportf (λ F : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

      
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
transportf (λ F : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R)))
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
transportf (λ F : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R)))
 apply (transport_map (fun F => dirprod_pr1(X := ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)(Y := ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))). 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
transportf (λ F : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

      apply (η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α).
    
C: precategory_data
D: category

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'

  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
pr2
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
transportf

   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R)))

   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧) Hob

pr2

     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R))) =

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
transportf
  (λ F : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
pr2
  (transportf
     (λ F : C → D,
      (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
      × (∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
     Hob (pr2 (pr1 R)))
 apply (transport_map (fun F => dirprod_pr2(X := ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)(Y := ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))). 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
transportf
  (λ F : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))

      apply (bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α).
Defined.


(* former more destructive proof: *)

D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D

α: z_iso R R'
R = R'

H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
R = R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
R = R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
     H J α) (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
R = R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
     H J α) (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
bind_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
     H J α) (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
R = R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 R) = pr1 (pr1 R')
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
bind_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R))) = pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
R = R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) R'
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)) = pr1 (pr1 R')
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
bind_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 R'))
(F,, e,, b),, a = R'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
F': C → D
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F' c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F' d ⟧ → D ⟦ F' c, F' d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F',, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F',, e',, b'),, a')
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: pr1 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)) = pr1 (pr1 ((F',, e',, b'),, a'))
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F',, e',, b'),, a')))
bind_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F',, e',, b'),, a')))
(F,, e,, b),, a = (F',, e',, b'),, a'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
F': C → D
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F' c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F' d ⟧ → D ⟦ F' c, F' d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F',, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F',, e',, b'),, a')
Hob:= pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  α: F = F'
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧) Hob
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F',, e',, b'),, a')))
bind_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧) Hob
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F',, e',, b'),, a')))
(F,, e,, b),, a = (F',, e',, b'),, a'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D, ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, x c ⟧)
  (idpath F)
  (pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr1 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e',, b'),, a')))
bind_eq: transportf
  (λ x : C → D,
   ∏ c d : C,
   D ⟦ J c, x d ⟧ → D ⟦ x c, x d ⟧)
  (idpath F)
  (pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a)))) =
pr2 (pr2 (pr1 ((F,, e',, b'),, a')))
(F,, e,, b),, a = (F,, e',, b'),, a'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
(F,, e,, b),, a = (F,, e',, b'),, a'

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
has_homsets D
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a) = pr1 ((F,, e',, b'),, a')

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
has_homsets D
 exact D.
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
pr1 ((F,, e,, b),, a) = pr1 ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
F,, e,, b = F,, e',, b'

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
F: C → D
e: ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b: ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a: RelMonad_axioms (F,, e,, b)
e': ∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧
b': ∏ c d : C, D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧
a': RelMonad_axioms (F,, e',, b')
α: z_iso ((F,, e,, b),, a) ((F,, e',, b'),, a')
η_eq: e = e'
bind_eq: b = b'
e,, b = e',, b'

    apply pathsdirprod; assumption.
Defined.




C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J (idtoiso p) = p

D: category

J: C ⟶ D

p: R = R'
relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J (idtoiso p) = p

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
  (base_paths R R'
     (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J (idtoiso p))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
  (base_paths R R'
     (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J (idtoiso p))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
  (base_paths R R'
     (RelMonad_eq R R' D
        (total2_paths_f
           (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
              H J (idtoiso p))
           (dirprodeq
              (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
              (∏ c d : C,
               D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
               → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ F : C → D,
                  (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                  × (∏ c d : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                 (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                    H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
              (pr2 (pr1 R'))
              (! transport_map
                   (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                   (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                      H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
               η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                 H J (idtoiso p))
              (! transport_map
                   (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                   (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                      H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
               bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                 H J (idtoiso p)))))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
  (base_paths R R'
     (total2_paths_f
        (total2_paths_f
           (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
              H J (idtoiso p))
           (dirprodeq
              (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
              (∏ c d : C,
               D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
               → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ F : C → D,
                  (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                  × (∏ c d : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                 (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                    H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
              (pr2 (pr1 R'))
              (! transport_map
                   (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                   (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                      H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
               η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                 H J (idtoiso p))
              (! transport_map
                   (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                   (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                      H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
               bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                 H J (idtoiso p))))
        (proofirrelevance (RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R'))
           (isaprop_RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R') D)
           (transportf RelMonad_axioms
              (total2_paths_f
                 (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                    H J (idtoiso p))
                 (dirprodeq
                    (∏ c : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
                    (∏ c d : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
                     → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c,
                       pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ F : C → D,
                        (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                        × (∏ c d : C,
                           D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧
                           → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                       (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J (idtoiso p))
                       (pr2 (pr1 R))) (pr2 (pr1 R'))
                    (! transport_map
                         (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                         (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                            H J (idtoiso p))
                         (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                     η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                       H J (idtoiso p))
                    (! transport_map
                         (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                         (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                            H J (idtoiso p))
                         (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                     bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                       H J (idtoiso p)))) (pr2 R))
           (pr2 R')))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
  (total2_paths_f
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J (idtoiso p))
     (dirprodeq (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
        (∏ c d : C,
         D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
         → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ F : C → D,
            (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
            × (∏ c d : C,
               D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
           (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
              H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
        (pr2 (pr1 R'))
        (! transport_map (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
             (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
         η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
           (idtoiso p))
        (! transport_map (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
             (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                H J (idtoiso p)) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
         bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
           J (idtoiso p)))) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J
  (idtoiso p) =
base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R') (base_paths R R' p)

    apply pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso_idtoiso.
Qed.

C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J
     (idtoiso (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J α)))
  c = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
  (R_functor R')
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths R_functor
        (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J α))) c =
α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (base_paths (pr1 (R_functor R))
        (pr1 (R_functor R'))
        (base_paths (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (maponpaths R_functor
              (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J α))))
     c) = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (base_paths (pr1 (R_functor R))
        (pr1 (R_functor R'))
        (base_paths (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (maponpaths R_functor
              (RelMonad_eq R R' D
                 (total2_paths_f
                    (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                       H J α)
                    (dirprodeq
                       (∏ c : C,
                        D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
                       (∏ c d : C,
                        D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
                        → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c,
                          pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ F : C → D,
                           (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                           × (∏ c d : C,
                              D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧
                              → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                          (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
                       (pr2 (pr1 R'))
                       (! transport_map
                            (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                            (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                               H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                        η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J α)
                       (! transport_map
                            (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                            (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                               H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                        bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J α))))))) c) = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (base_paths (pr1 (R_functor R))
        (pr1 (R_functor R'))
        (base_paths (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (maponpaths R_functor
              (total2_paths_f
                 (total2_paths_f
                    (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                       H J α)
                    (dirprodeq
                       (∏ c : C,
                        D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
                       (∏ c d : C,
                        D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
                        → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c,
                          pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
                       (transportf
                          (λ F : C → D,
                           (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                           × (∏ c d : C,
                              D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧
                              → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                          (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
                       (pr2 (pr1 R'))
                       (! transport_map
                            (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                            (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                               H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                        η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J α)
                       (! transport_map
                            (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                            (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                               H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                        bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J α)))
                 (proofirrelevance
                    (RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R'))
                    (isaprop_RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R')
                       D)
                    (transportf RelMonad_axioms
                       (total2_paths_f
                          (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             H J α)
                          (dirprodeq
                             (∏ c : C,
                              D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c
                              ⟧)
                             (∏ c d : C,
                              D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d
                              ⟧
                              → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c,
                                pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
                             (transportf
                                (λ F : C → D,
                                 (∏ ..., ...)
                                 × (∏ ..., ...))
                                (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                   H J α)
                                (pr2 (pr1 R)))
                             (pr2 (pr1 R'))
                             (! transport_map
                                  (λ F : C → D,
                                   dirprod_pr1)
                                  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                     H J α)
                                  (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                              η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                H J α)
                             (! transport_map
                                  (λ F : C → D,
                                   dirprod_pr2)
                                  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                     H J α)
                                  (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                              bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                H J α))) (pr2 R))
                    (pr2 R')))))) c) = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
        (base_paths R R'
           (total2_paths_f
              (total2_paths_f
                 (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                    H J α)
                 (dirprodeq
                    (∏ c : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
                    (∏ c d : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
                     → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c,
                       pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
                    (transportf
                       (λ F : C → D,
                        (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                        × (∏ c d : C,
                           D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧
                           → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                       (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
                    (pr2 (pr1 R'))
                    (! transport_map
                         (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                         (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                            H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                     η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                       H J α)
                    (! transport_map
                         (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                         (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                            H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                     bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                       H J α)))
              (proofirrelevance
                 (RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R'))
                 (isaprop_RelMonad_axioms (pr1 R') D)
                 (transportf RelMonad_axioms
                    (total2_paths_f
                       (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                          H J α)
                       (dirprodeq
                          (∏ c : C,
                           D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
                          (∏ c d : C,
                           D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
                           → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c,
                             pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
                          (transportf
                             (λ F : C → D,
                              (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                              × (∏ c d : C,
                                 D ⟦ ..., ... ⟧
                                 → D ⟦ ..., ... ⟧))
                             (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
                          (pr2 (pr1 R'))
                          (! transport_map
                               (λ F : C → D,
                                dirprod_pr1)
                               (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                  H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                           η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             H J α)
                          (! transport_map
                               (λ F : C → D,
                                dirprod_pr2)
                               (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                                  H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
                           bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                             H J α))) (pr2 R))
                 (pr2 R'))))) c) = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (base_paths (pr1 R) (pr1 R')
        (total2_paths_f
           (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
              H J α)
           (dirprodeq
              (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') c ⟧)
              (∏ c d : C,
               D ⟦ J c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧
               → D ⟦ pr1 (pr1 R') c, pr1 (pr1 R') d ⟧)
              (transportf
                 (λ F : C → D,
                  (∏ c : C, D ⟦ J c, F c ⟧)
                  × (∏ c d : C,
                     D ⟦ J c, F d ⟧ → D ⟦ F c, F d ⟧))
                 (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                    H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)))
              (pr2 (pr1 R'))
              (! transport_map
                   (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr1)
                   (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                      H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
               η_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                 H J α)
              (! transport_map
                   (λ F : C → D, dirprod_pr2)
                   (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                      H J α) (pr2 (pr1 R)) @
               bind_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso
                 H J α)))) c) = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) c) = α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) c) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid D H
        (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
           (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)))
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid D H
        (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
           (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c))) =
α c

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid D H
        (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
           (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c))) =
α c
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
pr1
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R')
     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c) = 
α c

         apply idpath.
    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) c) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid D H
        (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
           (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
           (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)))

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
idtoiso
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D)
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
     (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
     (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H
        J α) c) =
idtoiso
  (isotoid D H
     (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D
        (R_functor R) (R_functor R')
        (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c))

    
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
c: C
toforallpaths (λ _ : C, D) (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R)))
  (pr1 (pr1 (R_functor R')))
  (pr1_pr1_relmonadmor_eq_from_relmonadmor_z_iso H J α)
  c =
isotoid D H
  (functor_z_iso_pointwise_if_z_iso' C D (R_functor R)
     (R_functor R')
     (z_iso_from_is_relmonadmor_z_iso D J α) c)

    apply isotoid_functorcat_pointwise.
Qed.



C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R = R' ≃ z_iso R R'


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
R = R' ≃ z_iso R R'

H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
isweq idtoiso

J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
z_iso R R' → R = R'
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
∏ x : R = R', ?g (idtoiso x) = x
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
∏ y : z_iso R R', idtoiso (?g y) = y

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
z_iso R R' → R = R'
 exact (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J).
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
∏ x : R = R',
relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J (idtoiso x) = x
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J (idtoiso p) = p
 exact (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso_idtoiso H J p).
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
∏ y : z_iso R R',
idtoiso (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J y) = y
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
α: z_iso R R'
idtoiso (relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J α) = α
 exact (idtoiso_relmonad_eq_from_relmonad_z_iso H J α).
Defined.




C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
isweq idtoiso


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
isweq idtoiso

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
homotsec (relmonadmor_idtoiso H J R R') idtoiso
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
isweq (relmonadmor_idtoiso H J R R')
