D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
homotsec (relmonadmor_idtoiso H J R R') idtoiso
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
p: R = R'
relmonadmor_idtoiso H J R R' p = idtoiso p
 
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
relmonadmor_idtoiso H J R R (idpath R) =
idtoiso (idpath R)

    apply idpath.
  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': RelMonad J
isweq (relmonadmor_idtoiso H J R R')
 apply (pr2 _ ).
Qed.



C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
is_univalent (category_RelMonad D J)


C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
is_univalent (category_RelMonad D J)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
isweq (λ p : R = R', idtoiso p)

  
C: precategory_data
D: category
H: is_univalent D
J: C ⟶ D
R, R': category_RelMonad D J
is_univalent D

  exact H.
Defined.



End RelativeMonads_saturated.

Section RelAdjunctionWithKleisliCategory.
(** The canonical relative adjunction between J and the Kleisli category of a J-relative monad

    This is the obvious generalization of the material in [UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.KleisliCategory].

*)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
functor_data C (Kleisli_precat R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
functor_data C (Kleisli_precat R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
C → Kleisli_precat R
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Kleisli_precat R ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
C → Kleisli_precat R
 apply idfun.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → Kleisli_precat R ⟦ idfun C a, idfun C b ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ a, b ⟧

    exact (#J f · (r_eta R) b).
Defined.


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
is_functor (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
is_functor (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
functor_idax (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R)
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
functor_compax (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
functor_idax (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
# (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R) (identity a) =
identity (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R a)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
# J (identity a) · r_eta R a = identity a

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
identity (J a) · r_eta R a = identity a

    apply id_left.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
functor_compax (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R) (f · g) =
# (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R) f
· # (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R) g

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# J (f · g) · r_eta R c =
# J f · r_eta R b · (# J g · r_eta R c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# J (f · g) · r_eta R c =
# J f · r_eta R b · r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# J f · # J g · r_eta R c =
# J f · r_eta R b · r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# J f · (# J g · r_eta R c) =
# J f · (r_eta R b · r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R c))

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# J g · r_eta R c =
r_eta R b · r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R c)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r_eta R b · r_bind R (# J g · r_eta R c) =
# J g · r_eta R c

    apply (r_eta_r_bind R).
Defined.

Definition Left_rKleisli_functor {C: precategory_data} {D : precategory}
      {J : functor C D} (R: RelMonad J) :
  functor C (Kleisli_precat R)
  := (Left_rKleisli_functor_data R,,Left_rKleisli_is_functor R).


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
functor_data (Kleisli_precat R) D


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
functor_data (Kleisli_precat R) D

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
Kleisli_precat R → D
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ a b : Kleisli_precat R,
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
Kleisli_precat R → D
 exact R.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
∏ a b : Kleisli_precat R,
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ R a, R b ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: functor_data C D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: Kleisli_precat R
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ R a, R b ⟧

    apply r_bind.
Defined.


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
is_functor (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
is_functor (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
functor_idax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R)
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
(λ _ : functor_idax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R),
 functor_compax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R)) ?pr1

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
functor_idax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: Kleisli_precat R
# (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R) (identity a) =
identity (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R a)

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: Kleisli_precat R
r_bind R (r_eta R a) = pr1 (pr2 D) (R a)

    apply (r_bind_r_eta R).
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
(λ _ : functor_idax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R),
 functor_compax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R))
  ((λ a : Kleisli_precat R,
    (((r_bind_r_eta R a
       :
       pr2
         (make_functor_data R
            (λ a0 b : Kleisli_precat R, r_bind R)) a a
         (pr1 (pr2 (Kleisli_precat R)) a) =
       pr1 (pr2 D)
         (make_functor_data R
            (λ a0 b : Kleisli_precat R, r_bind R) a))
      :
      # (make_functor_data R
           (λ a0 b : Kleisli_precat R, r_bind R))
        (pr1 (pr2 (Kleisli_precat R)) a) =
      pr1 (pr2 D)
        (make_functor_data R
           (λ a0 b : Kleisli_precat R, r_bind R) a))
     :
     # (make_functor_data R
          (λ a0 b : Kleisli_precat R, r_bind R))
       (identity a) =
     identity
       (make_functor_data R
          (λ a0 b : Kleisli_precat R, r_bind R) a))
    :
    # (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R) (identity a) =
    identity (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R a))
   :
   functor_idax (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R))
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: Kleisli_precat R
f: Kleisli_precat R ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Kleisli_precat R ⟦ b, c ⟧
r_bind R (f · g) = r_bind R f · r_bind R g

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b, c: Kleisli_precat R
f: Kleisli_precat R ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: Kleisli_precat R ⟦ b, c ⟧
r_bind R f · r_bind R g = r_bind R (f · g)

    apply (r_bind_r_bind R).
Defined.

Definition Right_rKleisli_functor {C: precategory_data} {D : precategory}
      {J : functor C D} (R: RelMonad J) :
  functor (Kleisli_precat R) D
  := (Right_rKleisli_functor_data R,,Right_rKleisli_is_functor R).

(** Composition of the left and right Kleisli functors is equal to [R] as a functor **)


C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
Left_rKleisli_functor R ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R =
R_functor R


C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
Left_rKleisli_functor R ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R =
R_functor R

  
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
has_homsets D
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
pr1
  (Left_rKleisli_functor R ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R) =
pr1 (R_functor R)

  
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
has_homsets D
 exact hs.
  
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
pr1
  (Left_rKleisli_functor R ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R) =
pr1 (R_functor R)
 
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
homotsec
  (pr1
     (Left_rKleisli_functor R
      ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R)) (pr1 (R_functor R))
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (Left_rKleisli_functor R
      ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R)) (pr1 (R_functor R))
  (λ c : C,
   idtomor
     (pr1
        (Left_rKleisli_functor R
         ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R) c)
     (pr1 (R_functor R) c) (?H c))

    
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
homotsec
  (pr1
     (Left_rKleisli_functor R
      ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R)) (pr1 (R_functor R))
 intro a; apply idpath.
    
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
is_nat_trans
  (pr1
     (Left_rKleisli_functor R
      ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R)) (pr1 (R_functor R))
  (λ c : C,
   idtomor
     (pr1
        (Left_rKleisli_functor R
         ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R) c)
     (pr1 (R_functor R) c)
     (((λ a : C, idpath (pr1 (R_functor R) a))
       :
       homotsec
         (pr1
            (Left_rKleisli_functor R
             ∙ Right_rKleisli_functor R))
         (pr1 (R_functor R))) c))
 
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R b) · identity (R b) =
identity (R a) · r_lift R f

      
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R b) =
identity (R a) · r_lift R f

      
C, D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r_bind R (# J f · r_eta R b) = r_lift R f

      apply idpath.
Defined.

(** Showing that these functors are relative adjoints *)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
are_relative_adjoints J (Left_rKleisli_functor R)
  (Right_rKleisli_functor R)


C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
are_relative_adjoints J (Left_rKleisli_functor R)
  (Right_rKleisli_functor R)

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (X : C) (Y : Kleisli_precat R),
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R X, Y ⟧
≃ D ⟦ J X, Right_rKleisli_functor R Y ⟧
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
(λ hom_weq : ∏ (X : C) (Y : Kleisli_precat R),
             Kleisli_precat R
             ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R X, Y ⟧
             ≃ D ⟦ J X, Right_rKleisli_functor R Y ⟧,
 (∏ (Y : C) (Z : Kleisli_precat R)
  (f : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R Y, Z
       ⟧) (X : C) (h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
  hom_weq X Z (# (Left_rKleisli_functor R) h · f) =
  # J h · hom_weq Y Z f)
 × (∏ (X : C) (Y : Kleisli_precat R)
    (f : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R X,
         Y ⟧) (Z : Kleisli_precat R)
    (k : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
    hom_weq X Z (f · k) =
    hom_weq X Y f · # (Right_rKleisli_functor R) k))
  ?pr1

  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (X : C) (Y : Kleisli_precat R),
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R X, Y ⟧
≃ D ⟦ J X, Right_rKleisli_functor R Y ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b ⟧
≃ D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b ⟧
→ D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
(λ f : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b
       ⟧ → D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧,
 isweq f) ?pr1

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b ⟧
→ D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧ → D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧

      apply idfun.
    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
(λ f : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b
       ⟧ → D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧,
 isweq f)
  (idfun (D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧)
   :
   Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b ⟧
   → D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧)
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a: C
b: Kleisli_precat R
isweq (idfun (D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧))

      apply idisweq.
  
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
(λ hom_weq : ∏ (X : C) (Y : Kleisli_precat R),
             Kleisli_precat R
             ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R X, Y ⟧
             ≃ D ⟦ J X, Right_rKleisli_functor R Y ⟧,
 (∏ (Y : C) (Z : Kleisli_precat R)
  (f : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R Y, Z
       ⟧) (X : C) (h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
  hom_weq X Z (# (Left_rKleisli_functor R) h · f) =
  # J h · hom_weq Y Z f)
 × (∏ (X : C) (Y : Kleisli_precat R)
    (f : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R X,
         Y ⟧) (Z : Kleisli_precat R)
    (k : Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
    hom_weq X Z (f · k) =
    hom_weq X Y f · # (Right_rKleisli_functor R) k))
  (λ (a : C) (b : Kleisli_precat R),
   (idfun (D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧)
    :
    Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b ⟧
    → D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧),,
   (idisweq (D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧)
    :
    (λ f : Kleisli_precat R
           ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b ⟧
           → D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧,
     isweq f)
      (idfun (D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧)
       :
       Kleisli_precat R ⟦ Left_rKleisli_functor R a, b
       ⟧ → D ⟦ J a, Right_rKleisli_functor R b ⟧)))
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (Y Z : C) (f : D ⟦ J Y, R Z ⟧) (X : C)
(h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), # J h · r_eta R Y · f = # J h · f
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (X Y : C) (f : D ⟦ J X, R Y ⟧) (Z : C)
(k : D ⟦ J Y, R Z ⟧), f · k = f · r_bind R k

    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (Y Z : C) (f : D ⟦ J Y, R Z ⟧) (X : C)
(h : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧), # J h · r_eta R Y · f = # J h · f
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
c: C
h: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
# J h · r_eta R a · f = # J h · f

      
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
c: C
h: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
# J h · r_eta R a · r_bind R f = # J h · f

      
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
c: C
h: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
# J h · (r_eta R a · r_bind R f) = # J h · f

      
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
c: C
h: C ⟦ c, a ⟧
r_eta R a · r_bind R f = f

      apply (r_eta_r_bind R).
    
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
∏ (X Y : C) (f : D ⟦ J X, R Y ⟧) (Z : C)
(k : D ⟦ J Y, R Z ⟧), f · k = f · r_bind R k
 
C: precategory_data
D: precategory
hs: has_homsets D
J: C ⟶ D
R: RelMonad J
a, b: C
f: D ⟦ J a, R b ⟧
c: C
k: D ⟦ J b, R c ⟧
f · k = f · r_bind R k

      reflexivity.
Defined.

End RelAdjunctionWithKleisliCategory.
